title: neoporteria tuberisulcata var. nigricans
intro: Neoporteria tuberisulcata var. nigricans, also known as a black night-blooming cereus, is a cactus species native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing, and it has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Neoporteria tuberisulcata var. nigricans include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
